name: Popcorn Balls#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the mixture of Karo syrup, brown sugar, butter, and vinegar until it becomes hard when dropped in water.
2. Move the pan to the back of the stove.
3. Dissolve baking soda in 1 tablespoon water.
4. Pour the dissolved baking soda over freshly popped popcorn.
5. This will make about 3 dozen balls.
Source: Emma Harrington, Brinfield Grange, Portage County, OH
